verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Sometimes it seems God′s a million miles away, Too busy for a creature such as I, And then I think of how He sees each sparrow fall I call on Him and find that He is nigh

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The eyes of Jesus are upon each footstep that I take His ears are always open when I pray His hands are always there to help me lift my heavy load His heart is broken every time I stray

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In valleys low, I look toward the mountains high And praise the Lord that caused this world to be To think that God so great will hold me safe within His arms What love that He should ever care for me?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: His heart is broken every time I stray
